# @stll/fuzzy-search

Native fuzzy substring matching for Node.js and Bun,
implemented in Rust via NAPI-RS.

## API

```typescript
import { FuzzySearch, distance } from "@stll/fuzzy-search";

const fs = new FuzzySearch(
  [
    { pattern: "Novák", distance: 1, name: "surname" },
    { pattern: "Příbram", distance: "auto" },
  ],
  {
    normalizeDiacritics: true,
    wholeWords: true,
  },
);

fs.findIter("Nowák v Pribram");
// [
//   { pattern: 0, start: 0, end: 5, text: "Nowák", distance: 1, name: "surname" },
//   { pattern: 1, start: 8, end: 15, text: "Pribram", distance: 0 },
// ]

distance("kitten", "sitting"); // 3
distance("abcd", "abdc", "damerau-levenshtein"); // 1
```

## Notes

- Match offsets are UTF-16 code unit indices,
  compatible with `String.prototype.slice()`.
- Browser/WASM support is published separately as
  `@stll/fuzzy-search-wasm`.
